reviews.comment:
Poco personal para la atención en los surtidores!Tendrían que renovar el drugstore ,  muy deprimente.Los baños se nota que ya es Argentina ,sucios y falta de higiene

(Translated by Google)
Not enough staff to attend to the pumps! They really need to renovate the drugstore; it's very depressing. The bathrooms are clearly outdated, like they're in Argentina—dirty and unhygienic.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR0bGU3andnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy sucio los baños, falta mucha limpieza e higiene en su totalidad.

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are very dirty; there is a lack of cleanliness and hygiene overall.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR0aG9xTzVRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Es parada casi obligada previo a cruzar a Brasil o al ingresar del pais vecino. Lamentable la falta de higiene en los baños.  Tampoco tienen opciones de comida. Y ni hablar lo que demoran para cargarte combustible. Solo tienen 2 empleados y esta llena todo el tiempo. Lo positivo es que están los Sres. Que te cambian dinero de Pesos a Reales o a la inversa.

(Translated by Google)
It's practically a mandatory stop before crossing into Brazil or entering from the neighboring country. The lack of hygiene in the restrooms is deplorable. They also have no food options. And don't even get me started on the wait for fuel. They only have two employees and it's always packed. The positive thing is that there are people who exchange money from Pesos to Reais or vice versa.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR0Z3VXbFF3EAE
